vocab.meaning: một thiết bị xem giờ chuyên dụng
vocab.example: Using a dedicated timekeeping device prevents me from getting sucked into the vortex of social media notifications on my phone.
Wearing a watch is a personal commitment to uphold punctuality, ensuring I never keep my clients waiting.

vocab.meaning: sự ưu tiên dành cho đồ kim/truyền thống
vocab.example: My analog preference stems from the fact that sweeping hands provide a more intuitive grasp of how much of the hour remains.

vocab.meaning: giảm thiểu sự hiện diện/dấu vết kỹ thuật số
vocab.example: I try to minimize digital footprints in my personal life, so I rely on a mechanical watch rather than a smartwatch.

vocab.meaning: có được một vẻ ngoài chỉn chu/hoàn thiện
vocab.example: A classic leather strap watch is essential to attain a polished look when attending high-profile networking events.

vocab.meaning: các ranh giới về thời gian
vocab.example: Checking my wrist helps me establish strict temporal boundaries between my focused work sessions and leisure time.

vocab.meaning: không phụ thuộc vào pin (đồng hồ cơ/tự động)
vocab.example: I prefer automatic watches because they are battery-independent, making them reliable during long hiking trips.

vocab.meaning: gợi lên vẻ uy tín/quyền lực
vocab.example: In certain industries, a luxury timepiece can evoke an authoritative presence even before a word is spoken.
I wear a watch to shun the inconvenience of fumbling through my pockets for a phone while carrying groceries.

vocab.meaning: năng lực được người khác nhìn nhận
vocab.example: Research suggests that wearing a watch can actually boost your perceived competence in a professional interview setting.
